projectName: AetherForge — The Composable NFT Yield & Liquidity Engine
hackathon: ETHGlobal HackMoney 2026 — LI.FI & Arc/Circle cross‑chain track, prize pool $100K+
description: AetherForge is a modular, cross‑chain protocol that turns illiquid NFTs into yield‑bearing, composable assets. The core layer consists of a Vault (ERC‑4626 compatible) that accepts NFTs or NFT‑shares, a Token (Nebula) representing vault shares, an AccessControl governor for role‑based permissions, and a Registry that tracks deployed module adapters. Module contracts plug into the core: Fractionalizer mints ERC‑20 shares from whole NFTs, RentalManager enables time‑bound NFT leasing with escrowed
angle: AetherForge captures the $12B NFTfi market by letting users fractionalize, rent, and lend NFTs inside cross‑chain vaults that auto‑compound yield via automated liquidity provision and rebalancing.
